top_findings.summary: The skill description includes checking and installing a third-party MCP server (apifox-mcp-server) across multiple AI platforms (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, TRAE, Manus, Coze) by reading and editing their configuration files (e.g., ~/.cursor/mcp.json, ~/.manus/mcp.json). This action goes beyond the stated primary purpose of updating and maintaining four core skill files (Markdown documents) and introduces unnecessary modifications to system configurations and external dependencies. While the MCP may enhance the skills' functionality, it is not essential for the basic file update process and could pose security or privacy risks by executing external npm packages and connecting to specific external services (site-id=5442569).
